text:
Agents are getting capable.
Enterprise knowledge is not.
textPreview: Agents are getting capable. | Enterprise knowledge is not.

text: The missing layer is a human review layer for messy documents, diagrams, and business rules.
textPreview: The missing layer is a human review layer for messy documents, diagrams, and business rules.

text: Make the knowledge trustworthy before agents act.
textPreview: Make the knowledge trustworthy before agents act.

title: The blocker is not the agent.

text: The blocker is not the agent.
textPreview: The blocker is not the agent.

text: It is the knowledge the agent has to work with.
textPreview: It is the knowledge the agent has to work with.

text: AGENTS
textPreview: AGENTS

text: They can plan and execute.
textPreview: They can plan and execute.

text: Modern agents can call tools, coordinate steps, and move work forward.
textPreview: Modern agents can call tools, coordinate steps, and move work forward.

text: ENTERPRISE CONTEXT
textPreview: ENTERPRISE CONTEXT

text: It still lives in messy files.
textPreview: It still lives in messy files.

text: Specifications, business rules, approvals, and exceptions are scattered across PowerPoint, Word, PDF, and diagrams.
textPreview: Specifications, business rules, approvals, and exceptions are scattered across PowerPoint, Word, PDF, and diagrams.

text: RESULT
textPreview: RESULT

text: Agents stall or guess.
textPreview: Agents stall or guess.

text: If the source knowledge is not structured, the agent cannot safely decide what matters.
textPreview: If the source knowledge is not structured, the agent cannot safely decide what matters.

text: Complex diagrams break first.
textPreview: Complex diagrams break first.

text: A single wrong arrow can change the business rule.
textPreview: A single wrong arrow can change the business rule.

text: The model may capture text, but the risk is in the relationships: branching, grouping, approval paths, exceptions, and hierarchy.
textPreview: The model may capture text, but the risk is in the relationships: branching, grouping, approval paths, exceptions, and hierarchy.

text: This is exactly where human review should be fast, visual, and easy to correct.
textPreview: This is exactly where human review should be fast, visual, and easy to correct.

Use today's models.
Review risky meaning.

by design
